questions.text: Which of these is a metal?
questions.explanation: Iron is a metal. Sulphur, oxygen, and carbon are non-metals.

questions.text: Metals are good conductors of heat and electricity.
questions.explanation: Metals have free electrons that allow them to conduct heat and electricity efficiently.

questions.correctAnswer: Malleability is the property of metals to be beaten into thin sheets.
questions.explanation: Malleability is a characteristic property of metals that allows them to be hammered or rolled into thin sheets without breaking.
Non-metals are generally brittle and break when hammered, unlike metals which are malleable.
